title: Tick Buffer VWAP and Short-Window Imbalance Engine
subtitle: Circular Ring Buffer for Ticks, Rolling VWAP, Uptick/Downtick Flow Formula, Spread Filter
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: MEDIUM EXTRACT — Flow formula (up-down)/(up+down) is a new order flow metric. Spread filter (spread < ATR×0.5) is a new quality gate. Rolling VWAP from ticks is superior to session VWAP. Tick-level granularity not available for our synthetic instruments.

core_concept.values: +1 = all ticks up (pure buying), -1 = all ticks down (pure selling), 0 = balanced
core_concept.signal_gate: flow > InpFlowTh (0.30) for bullish, flow < -InpFlowTh for bearish
core_concept.hysteresis: Reset trigger at flow_threshold * hysteresis_factor (0.30 * 0.80 = 0.24) — prevents rapid toggling
core_concept.spread_filter: spread < ATR * InpCheapSpreadFrac (0.50) — only trade when spread is 'cheap'
core_concept.vwap_rolling: Rolling VWAP over last InpVWAPminutes (1440 min = 24h). Price above = premium. Price below = discount.
core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: Flow formula captures order flow direction (not available in OHLCV bar data). For Deriv synthetics, tick volume is proportional to time not activity — flow would be meaningless. For FTMO forex, this adds genuine order flow context.

ring_buffer.structure: Circular buffer: 4 arrays (timestamps, bid, ask, last_price, volume). Size = InpRingSize (20000 ticks)
ring_buffer.window_calc: For any window: iterate from head backward until timestamp < cutoff

vwap_formula: vwap = sum(price[i] * volume[i]) / sum(volume[i]) for all ticks in window

keep: Flow formula: (up-dn)/(up+dn) — order flow direction metric
Hysteresis pattern: signal at threshold, reset at threshold×0.8
Spread filter: spread < ATR×0.5 as trade quality gate
Rolling VWAP concept (24h window, not session-based)
discard: Tick-level implementation for synthetics (tick volume = time on Deriv, not activity)
Ring buffer (our Python already handles bar data efficiently)
30-second imbalance window (bar-level is sufficient for our M1 strategy)
improve: Spread filter is immediately applicable: before any entry, check spread < ATR * 0.5
Flow formula adapted for bar data: uptick_bars = bars where close > open; flow = (uptick_bars - downtick_bars) / total_bars over last N bars
Hysteresis pattern: apply to our ADX gate — ADX_entry_threshold=20, ADX_reset_threshold=17 (not requiring ADX to re-fall to 0)

bar_level_flow.description: Adapt flow to bar data for non-tick environments
bar_level_flow.formula: for last N bars: up = sum(1 for b in bars if b.close > b.open); dn = N - up; flow = (up - dn) / N
bar_level_flow.note: Less precise than tick flow but available on all bar-based data sources
